languages.text: "Себериан, не дадим этим болванам и рта раскрыть — все равно из их глоток польется яд. К бою!"

traits.locale_text: "Себериан, не дадим этим болванам и рта раскрыть — все равно из их глоток польется яд. К бою!"

languages.text: "Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"
languages.original_text: "Себериан, не дадим этим болванам и рта раскрыть — все равно из их глоток польется яд. К бою!"

traits.locale_text: "Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"
"Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"
"Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"

languages.text: “塞贝里安，别给这些蠢货开口的机会，他们的嘴里只会喷出毒液。开战吧！”
languages.original_text: "Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安，别给这些蠢货开口的机会，他们的嘴里只会喷出毒液。开战吧！”

languages.text: « Seberian, ne laissons pas à ces imbéciles l'occasion d'ouvrir la bouche, seul du fiel s'en déverserait. Aux armes ! »
languages.original_text: "Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"

traits.locale_text: « Seberian, ne laissons pas à ces imbéciles l'occasion d'ouvrir la bouche, seul du fiel s'en déverserait. Aux armes ! »

languages.text: "Seberian, bu aptallara ağızlarını açma şansı vermeyelim. Boğazlarından sadece zehir akacak. Savaşa!"
languages.original_text: "Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"

traits.locale_text: "Seberian, bu aptallara ağızlarını açma şansı vermeyelim. Boğazlarından sadece zehir akacak. Savaşa!"

languages.text: «Seberian, será mejor no dar a estos necios opción a abrir la boca; solo escupirán veneno. ¡A la batalla!».
languages.original_text: "Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"

traits.locale_text: «Seberian, será mejor no dar a estos necios opción a abrir la boca; solo escupirán veneno. ¡A la batalla!».

languages.text: "Seberian, gebt diesen Narren nicht die Chance, ihren Mund zu öffnen ... aus ihren Kehlen kommt nichts als Gift. Auf in den Kampf!"
languages.original_text: "Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"

traits.locale_text: "Seberian, gebt diesen Narren nicht die Chance, ihren Mund zu öffnen ... aus ihren Kehlen kommt nichts als Gift. Auf in den Kampf!"

languages.text: 「シベリア、この愚か者たちに口を開く機会を与えちゃいけない。彼らの喉からは毒しか出ない。戦おう！」
languages.original_text: "Seberian, let's not give these fools the chance to open their mouths — only poison will pour from their throats. To battle!"

traits.locale_text: 「シベリア、この愚か者たちに口を開く機会を与えちゃいけない。彼らの喉からは毒しか出ない。戦おう！」
